agents.handoff: Record the decision, remaining uncertainty, and exact next state action.
agents.inputs: state snapshot | open human inputs | current workflow | recent checkpoint
agents.outputs: answered input | clarified constraint | next action | checkpoint update
agents.purpose: Clarify intent, constraints, trade-offs, and human decisions without expanding implementation scope.
agents.title: Facilitator

agents.handoff: List touched files, checks, failures, and the next repair or review step.
agents.inputs: active story | acceptance criteria | linked artifacts | context pack
agents.outputs: minimal diff | checks run | evidence summary | updated story state
agents.purpose: Apply scoped code or artifact changes for the active story and keep progress file-backed.
agents.title: Implementer

agents.handoff: Preserve user-facing state, support risks, and whether evolution should start.
agents.inputs: ready evidence | usage notes | support status | feedback
agents.outputs: operating note | support update | future backlog item | evolution trigger
agents.purpose: Maintain a ready project through usage notes, support status, feedback, and future backlog.
agents.title: Operator

agents.handoff: Preserve story order, unresolved risks, and the next executable story.
agents.inputs: spec artifact | risk notes | module manifest | current sprint
agents.outputs: story plan | risk plan | validation plan | updated sprint
agents.purpose: Turn specs, risks, and constraints into executable stories, sequencing, and validation strategy.
agents.title: Planner

agents.handoff: Record findings, repaired items, remaining risks, and gate status.
agents.inputs: diff | story criteria | evidence ledger | gate output | artifact index
agents.outputs: blocking findings | non-blocking findings | required checks | approval evidence
agents.purpose: Review implementation, artifacts, workflows, and evidence before work is marked done or ready.
agents.title: Quality Reviewer
agents.when: story review | quality gate | audit failure | ready gate

agents.handoff: Preserve sources, date, decision impact, and unresolved verification gaps.
agents.inputs: question | decision to support | source constraints | freshness needs
agents.outputs: source-backed findings | recommendation | confidence | cited evidence artifact
agents.purpose: Collect current external or domain evidence only when it changes a decision or requirement.
agents.title: Researcher
agents.when: discovery uncertainty | specification risk | market or technical evidence needed

agents.handoff: Preserve requirement decisions, rejected scope, and planning assumptions.
agents.inputs: intent brief | constraints | module purpose | human decisions
agents.outputs: requirements | acceptance criteria | boundaries | specification artifact
agents.purpose: Convert clarified intent into requirements, acceptance criteria, boundaries, and non-goals.
agents.title: Spec Architect

elicitation_techniques.title: Assumption Spotlight
elicitation_techniques.when: A plan depends on hidden beliefs, market guesses, or unproven user behavior.

elicitation_techniques.title: Tradeoff Map
elicitation_techniques.when: The human is choosing between viable directions with different costs.

elicitation_techniques.title: Acceptance Slice
elicitation_techniques.when: A broad idea needs a testable first version or implementation boundary.

elicitation_techniques.title: Experience Walkthrough
elicitation_techniques.when: UX, onboarding, game feel, support flow, or human guidance quality is the main risk.

elicitation_techniques.title: Evidence Ladder
elicitation_techniques.when: Research, market, technical, or quality confidence is too vague.

elicitation_techniques.title: Risk Inversion
elicitation_techniques.when: A plan looks plausible but weak proof could hide serious failure modes.

elicitation_techniques.title: Story Spine
elicitation_techniques.when: A narrative, campaign, brand, or product promise needs a coherent arc.

elicitation_techniques.title: Constraint Remix
elicitation_techniques.when: Brainstorming is stuck or producing generic options.

elicitation_techniques.title: Implementation Trace
elicitation_techniques.when: A decision needs to become stories, code, checks, and evidence.

elicitation_techniques.title: Quality Crosscheck
elicitation_techniques.when: Release confidence depends on requirements, risks, tests, and waivers lining up.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a product lens: clarify the promise, expose assumptions, choose the smallest valuable slice, and preserve rejected scope.
persona_lenses.title: Product Manager Lens
persona_lenses.when: Product promise, scope, value, roadmap, tradeoff, or acceptance uncertainty.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use an architecture lens: connect accepted decisions to interfaces, constraints, risks, and build boundaries before stories.
persona_lenses.title: Architect Lens
persona_lenses.when: Technical shape, interfaces, constraints, migration, performance, or implementation boundaries.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a research lens: separate facts from guesses, pick the source that changes the decision, and preserve uncertainty.
persona_lenses.title: Analyst Researcher Lens
persona_lenses.when: Evidence, benchmark, market, domain, feasibility, or uncertainty needs grounding.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a UX lens: walk the real experience, reject generic interaction, and define proof for the desired feeling.
persona_lenses.title: UX Designer Lens
persona_lenses.when: Taste, journey, interaction model, onboarding, states, accessibility, or human guidance quality.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a QA lens: map risk to checks, demand evidence, and name the waiver or gate decision explicitly.
persona_lenses.title: QA Strategist Lens
persona_lenses.when: Quality, risk, test strategy, traceability, NFR, CI, evidence, or release confidence.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a game lens: make the player fantasy concrete, test the loop, and cut to a playable proof.
persona_lenses.title: Game Designer Lens
persona_lenses.when: Player fantasy, loop, mechanics, content, fun proof, game UX, or first playable slice.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a builder lens: split human guidance from agent contract, define proof, then patch the smallest runtime surface.
persona_lenses.title: Builder Lens
persona_lenses.when: Forge runtime, workflow, module, skill, agent, template, eval, or plugin behavior.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a tech-writing lens: identify source of truth, remove misleading prose, and leave a compact handoff.
persona_lenses.title: Tech Writer Lens
persona_lenses.when: Documentation, source-of-truth, editorial clarity, onboarding, or compact agent handoff.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a brainstorming coach: widen the option set, change constraints deliberately, then converge on a defensible direction.
persona_lenses.title: Brainstorming Coach
persona_lenses.when: The human needs divergent options before selecting a direction.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a design-thinking coach: ground the problem in a real human, reframe it, and make the prototype proof explicit.
persona_lenses.title: Design Thinking Coach
persona_lenses.when: The problem needs empathy, reframing, ideation, prototype shape, or human-centered proof.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use an innovation lens: compare options by evidence, adoption friction, strategic fit, and reversibility.
persona_lenses.title: Innovation Strategist
persona_lenses.when: The human is exploring novel directions, market posture, or strategic option sets.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a problem-solving lens: name the failure mode, invert the risk, and choose the next reversible move.
persona_lenses.title: Creative Problem Solver
persona_lenses.when: The human is stuck, frustrated, correcting course, or dealing with a messy constraint.

persona_lenses.human_prompt: Use a storytelling lens: shape the arc, pressure, payoff, and rejected alternate direction before specification.
persona_lenses.title: Storyteller Lens
persona_lenses.when: Narrative, brand story, campaign, content arc, character, or thematic coherence matters.
